---
name: 📚 Documentation Request
about: Request new documentation or an update to existing docs
title: "[Docs]: "
labels: ["type: documentation"]
---

## 🎯 Objective:
_What is the context of this documentation request? Is it a missing guide, an inaccuracy, or does something need further clarification?_

## 📜 Requirements

### Scope
_Provide a description and scope of the required documentation. What topics should be covered? What is the target audience?_

### Current State
_Is there existing documentation that needs to be updated, or is this a new documentation request? If it’s an update, what is lacking or inaccurate in the current documentation?_

### Expected State
_What do you expect the documentation to cover after the update or creation?_

### Use Case(s)
_Identify specific use cases that the documentation should address._

### Definitions and acronyms
_List and define any specific terms, acronyms, or abbreviations that the documentation should clarify._

### Format
_Specify the desired format for the documentation (e.g., markdown, PDF, online wiki, etc.)._

### Examples
_Provide examples if possible. Examples can help make abstract concepts concrete._

## ⏭️  Next actions

- [ ] Identify topics to be covered
- [ ] Assign the documentation task to a team member
- [ ] Review the draft
- [ ] Publish the documentation
